memoryArtifacts.headline: Mathilde de Béthune (1220-1264)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Mahaut ou Mathilde de Béthune (vers 1220 - 15 novembre 1264) est de la maison de Béthune. Elle est la mère de Robert III de Flandre.

Ses parents sont Robert VII de Béthune (en) et Élisabeth de Morial …

memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/FLEMISH%20NOBILITY.htm#MathildeBethuneMEverardTournai as of 5/24/2016

MATHILDE de Béthune (after 1230-8 Nov 1264).  Dame de Béthune, Dendermonde, Richebourg …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Béthune於大約1230年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，她的父親Robert VII seigneur de Béthune34歲，母親Elisabeth de Morialmé42歲。她於1246年2月2日與Guy de Dampierre結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年11月8日在法國福藍德 福藍薩享年35歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德福林-利斯-拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Béthune于大约1230年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內时，她的父亲Robert VII seigneur de Béthune34岁，母亲Elisabeth de Morialmé42岁。她于1246年2月2日与Guy de Dampierre结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年11月8日在法国福藍德 福藍薩享年35岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德福林-利斯-拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Béthune was born about 1230, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Robert VII seigneur de Béthune, was 34 and her mother, Elisabeth de Morialmé, was 42. She married Guy de Dampierre on 2 February 1246. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 November 1264, in French Flanders, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Béthune est née environ 1230, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Robert VII seigneur de Béthune, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Morialmé, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Dampierre le 2 février 1246. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 novembre 1264, à Flandre française, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Béthune um 1230 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert VII seigneur de Béthune 34 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Morialmé 42. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1246 Guy de Dampierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. November 1264 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Flandre française, Frankreich und wurde in Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune è nata il circa 1230 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Robert VII seigneur de Béthune, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Morialmé, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Guy de Dampierre il 2 febbraio 1246. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1264, nel Flandre française, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthuneが約1230年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert VII seigneur de Béthuneは34歳，母Elisabeth de Morialméは42歳であった。1246年2月2日にGuy de Dampierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年11月8日にフランスフランダー フランcアイゼで35歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードフライネス-ルeス-ラチェスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Béthune(이)가 대략 1230년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert VII seigneur de Béthune(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Morialmé(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1246년 2월 2일 Guy de Dampierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 11월 8일 프랑스 플랜드르 프랜c아이스에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 플라이네스-e스-라체스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Béthune nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Robert VII seigneur de Béthune, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Dampierre em 2 de fevereiro de 1246. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1264, em Flandre française, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Béthune родилась около 1230 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert VII seigneur de Béthune было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Morialmé, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Dampierre 2 февраля 1246 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 ноября 1264 г. в местности фландр франcеис, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности флаинес-лeс-рэичесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Béthune nació aproximadamente 1230, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Robert VII seigneur de Béthune, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Guy de Dampierre el 2 de febrero de 1246. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1264, en Flandre française, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Flines-lès-Raches, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
